new_articles.title: Chip giant SK Hynix raises $34 billion in world’s second largest stock listing
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Chip giant SK Hynix raises $34 billion in world’s second largest stock listing'이다. Record-setting offering caps a dramatic success story for SK Hynix. SK Hynix said this week it hoped to raise a whopping 43 trillion won or US$28 billion, but recent volatility in the company’s shares had apparently scaled back the target Samsung, SK Hynix and Micron dominate the global market for the advanced components known as high-bandwidth memory (HBM), used in AI servers alongside other data-crunching semiconductors Counterpoint Research analyst MS Hwang said SK Hynix wants to triumph over Samsung in the red-hot memory chip market SK Hynix has said proceeds from the offering will be used to fund new chip factories to ease shortages SK Hynix is set to begin when-issued trading on July 10 on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the symbol SKHYV, which will change to SKHY when they begin regular-way trading July 13. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

Record-setting offering caps a dramatic success story for SK Hynix. SK Hynix said this week it hoped to raise a whopping 43 trillion won or US$28 billion, but recent volatility in the company’s shares had apparently scaled back the target Samsung, SK Hynix and Micron dominate the global market for the advanced components known as high-bandwidth memory (HBM), used in AI servers alongside other data-crunching semiconductors Counterpoint Research analyst MS Hwang said SK Hynix wants to triumph over Samsung in the red-hot memory chip market SK Hynix has said proceeds from the offering will be used to fund new chip factories to ease shortages SK Hynix is set to begin when-issued trading on July 10 on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the symbol SKHYV, which will change to SKHY when they begin regular-way trading July 13. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in US market debut
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in US market debut'이다. South Korean memory chipmaker completes largest-ever US listing by a foreign company. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

new_articles.title: Where Jim Cramer stands on SK Hynix's massive offering
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Where Jim Cramer stands on SK Hynix's massive offering'이다. CNBC's Jim Cramer said SK Hynix looks remarkably cheap, but warned that buying it is a bet that the AI-driven memory boom won't end like previous cycles. Cramer said the stock looks remarkably cheap despite its enormous rally, but warned that buying SK Hynix is ultimately a bet that the AI-driven memory boom won't end like previous cycles SK Hynix's South Korea-listed shares have soared roughly 2,550% since ChatGPT launched in November 2022, propelling its market value above $1 trillion SK Hynix shares have fallen about 25% from their June 25 peak, joining a broader sell-off in memory stocks that has hit fellow Korean tech giant Samsung and Idaho-based Micron despite strong earnings reports For investors considering SK Hynix, Cramer said the opportunity ultimately comes down to whether AI has permanently changed the notoriously boom-and-bust memory business " watch now VIDEO 8:33 08:33 Jim Cramer talks what to expect from SK Hynix's U. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Air India fourth most punctual airline in the world
new_articles.summary: Korean Air 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Air India fourth most punctual airline in the world'이다. Air India achieved the world's fourth most punctual airline ranking in June. The airline recorded an impressive 86. 85% on-time arrival rate across many flights. This significant improvement reflects sustained investments in operational resilience and planning. Saudia airlines secured the top position in these prestigious rankings. Korean Air and Aeromexico also placed higher than Singapore Airlines.

new_articles.title: SK hynix: From near-collapse to a $1 trillion valuation and a Nasdaq listing
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK hynix: From near-collapse to a $1 trillion valuation and a Nasdaq listing'이다. SK hynix, the South Korean chipmaker whose memory chips power AI data centres around the world, lists on the Nasdaq this week in one of the largest share sales in history, capping a journey from near-bankruptcy to a trillion-dollar valuation. SK hynix reported first-quarter revenue above 50 trillion won (€29bn) and operating margins north of 70%, figures unheard of for a chipmaker, and commands about 60% of the high-bandwidth memory (HBM) market, according to Counterpoint Research The AI-driven rally that transformed SK hynix has begun to wobble as chip stocks sold off sharply across Asia last week, and Samsung lost more than $100 billion (€87 Related The AI boom propping up markets could trigger the next crash, central banks warn Samsung loses over $100bn in market value despite record AI-driven profit Built, broken and rebuilt Those concerns are not new for SK hynix SK hynix traces its roots to Gukdo Construction, founded in 1949, which moved into electronics in 1983 as Hyundai Electronics, an arm of the Hyundai empire Starved of capital, it was rescued in 2012 by the telecoms conglomerate SK Group, becoming SK hynix. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

Secondary US listing of trillion-dollar South Korean chipmaker expected to be one of largest public offerings in history. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

matched_articles.title: Meet SK Hynix, the trillion-dollar South Korean chipmaker debuting on U.S. markets
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Meet SK Hynix, the trillion-dollar South Korean chipmaker debuting on U.S. markets'이다. Following a more than sevenfold rally in its stock price over the past year, South Korea's SK Hynix is listing on the Nasdaq. In June , Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang visited SK Hynix on a trip to Seoul, as the two companies announced a multiyear partnership "That advantage has positioned SK Hynix as one of the biggest beneficiaries of the rapid growth in AI infra," said TrendForce analyst Ellie Wang SK Hynix expects to receive up to $458 million in funding from the U "These agreements typically require customers to provide longer-term demand visibility," said TrendForce's Wang, allowing SK Hynix to plan its spending with more confidence , SK Hynix has big expansion plans on top of its Indiana project. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK hynix: From near-collapse to a $1 trillion valuation and a Nasdaq listing'이다. SK hynix, the South Korean chipmaker whose memory chips power AI data centres around the world, lists on the Nasdaq this week in one of the largest share sales in history, capping a journey from near-bankruptcy to a trillion-dollar valuation. SK hynix reported first-quarter revenue above 50 trillion won (€29bn) and operating margins north of 70%, figures unheard of for a chipmaker, and commands about 60% of the high-bandwidth memory (HBM) market, according to Counterpoint Research The AI-driven rally that transformed SK hynix has begun to wobble as chip stocks sold off sharply across Asia last week, and Samsung lost more than $100 billion (€87 Related The AI boom propping up markets could trigger the next crash, central banks warn Samsung loses over $100bn in market value despite record AI-driven profit Built, broken and rebuilt Those concerns are not new for SK hynix SK hynix traces its roots to Gukdo Construction, founded in 1949, which moved into electronics in 1983 as Hyundai Electronics, an arm of the Hyundai empire Starved of capital, it was rescued in 2012 by the telecoms conglomerate SK Group, becoming SK hynix. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
